hero.description: Multiple wireless sound nodes work together, letting music arrive from front and back, near and far, all around you. Not just clearer sound — your first real step inside it.

product.title: Not louder — more spatial
product.description: BubbleFlow fills the entire room with sound through multiple wireless nodes, so direction, distance, motion and layering can all be heard.
product.card1Desc: Vocals, instruments and ambient sounds no longer crowd a single plane — they emerge naturally from different directions.
product.card2Desc: Sound gains depth and layering. Quiet moments feel closer, grand passages feel wider, and emotions feel more real.
product.card3Desc: Sound can move through space, giving music, games and performances a more vivid sense of presence.

scenes.title: One system, three everyday rituals
scenes.description: Nodes adapt to your room and routine. You don't change your life — you just hear an extra dimension in it.
scenes.scene1Desc: Bring the surround feel of a concert hall to your couch. Multiple nodes deliver dialogue, live performances and game audio from different directions for a stronger sense of space.
scenes.scene2Desc: Headphones feel stuffy at night, speakers might disturb others. Two nodes at the bedside create a small sound field — intimate yet contained.
scenes.scene3Desc: Place nodes on either side of your screen. Footsteps, ambient cues and creative assets appear from more precise locations, helping you focus.

audio.title: Close your eyes — you still know where the sound is
audio.description: The human ear naturally judges direction, distance and motion of sound. Multiple nodes around the listener work together, bringing this instinct back to music and content.
audio.dim2Value: How far sound is from you

features.title: Complex technology, simple enjoyment
features.description: From placement to listening to storage, BubbleFlow aims for spatial audio to be not just a technology, but a product you want to use every day.
features.feat1Desc: Multiple sound nodes work together, so a single speaker no longer carries the entire room.
features.feat2Desc: Arrange nodes freely across living room, bedroom or desk — the system adapts to your space.
features.feat3Desc: Return direction, distance and motion to sound. Hear richer, more authentic detail.
features.feat4Desc: No need to stare at a screen — your ears tell you how the scene unfolds around you.
features.feat5Desc: Bring the enveloping feel of a live performance home. A dedicated space for the music you love.
features.feat6Desc: Return nodes to the dock after use for charging and storage. Daily use stays simple and tidy.

specs.title: Understand first, then decide
specs.description: Product form, usage space and official channels — we put the most important information right here.
specs.q1: How is it different from a regular speaker?
specs.a1: Regular speakers mainly project sound from one location. BubbleFlow uses multiple wireless nodes working together to give sound direction, distance, motion and spatial layering.
specs.a2: You can arrange nodes flexibly across living rooms, bedrooms and desks for music, movies, games and spatial content.
specs.a3: The product is designed around wireless multi-node deployment and a charging dock, reducing cables and daily tidying — making spatial audio easier to bring into the home.
specs.q4: Where can I learn more now?
specs.a4: Follow product updates and pre-sale progress through the BubbleFlow official website, WeChat Mini Program and authorized Taobao store.

cta.title: Your next Live starts in your room
cta.description: Follow BubbleFlow official channels for product updates, experience events and pre-sale information.
cta.tag4: Specific offers subject to official announcements

footer.tagline: Let sound leave the plane and come alive in your room.
footer.subtitle: BubbleFlow · Multi-dimensional Intelligent Audio Platform
